name: @onderling/redaction
description: Generic, config-driven redaction atom. redact(text, config) → {text, hits}: ordered regex rules + named-validator registry (bsn-11proef, nl-phone, iban, luhn) + an optional gazetteer name-pass. Locale-agnostic — all locale content is data the caller supplies. Extracted from feedback-pipeline's redact.js + names.js.
